items.claim: Jared Cannonier possesses a high level of stubbornness and desire to continue his career.
items.quote: Canoneer, he's proven to be quite the stubborn fellow.

items.claim: Jared Cannonier is at risk of retirement if he suffers a finish loss.
items.quote: I think Caner if he loses if he gets finished I think he might be done after that.

items.claim: Mitch Ramirez has questionable ability to remain in the UFC compared to his peers.
items.quote: I'm sure Mitch still wants it, but there's a question of his ability.

items.claim: Tommy McMillan is an entertaining fighter because fans enjoy rooting for him to lose.
items.quote: I think as much of a donk as he is, he is entertaining, you know, and also people like root for him to lose.
